fields.SELL_PURSUE: Teams actively exploring how to add AI into existing Elastic workflows.
fields.SELL_PAUSE: Teams experimenting with AI but without clear production use cases.
fields.SELL_OPEN: How are you planning to operationalize AI inside existing systems?
fields.SELL_LENS: Qualify in on AI use cases, platform consolidation, and operational simplicity.

fields.SELL_PURSUE: Applications struggling with slow search or poor relevance at scale.
fields.SELL_PAUSE: Small applications where basic database search is sufficient.
fields.SELL_OPEN: What happens when users cannot find what they need quickly?
fields.SELL_LENS: Qualify in on search scale, relevance problems, and user experience impact.

fields.SELL_PURSUE: Engineering teams struggling to diagnose incidents across complex systems.
fields.SELL_PAUSE: Organizations with simple architectures and limited operational complexity.
fields.SELL_OPEN: How long does it usually take to identify the root cause?
fields.SELL_LENS: Qualify in on system complexity, incident response pain, and visibility gaps.

fields.SELL_PURSUE: Security teams overwhelmed by alerts or expensive SIEM operations.
fields.SELL_PAUSE: Organizations with minimal security monitoring maturity.
fields.SELL_OPEN: How much time does your team spend investigating false positives?
fields.SELL_LENS: Qualify in on SIEM cost pressure, alert volume, and investigation speed.

fields.SELL_PURSUE: Leaders trying to consolidate multiple observability and security tools.
fields.SELL_PAUSE: Organizations committed to maintaining separate specialized data platforms.
fields.SELL_OPEN: How many different tools does your team use to understand operational data?
fields.SELL_LENS: Qualify in on platform consolidation, data scale, and cross-team collaboration.
